pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to support the new JDK baseline.
Adopt Spring Boot 3.2.3 as the parent POM to manage dependencies and build configuration for the new JDK.
Bump the Keycloak dependency version to 24.0.5 to align with the supported server version.
Add JVM arguments to export internal security packages required by dependencies on Java 21.

.github/workflows/ci.yaml.general_idea: Upgrade the Java runtime used in the CI build from version 11 to version 21 to match the target JDK migration.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Migrate the Docker base images from Java 11 to Java 21 to align with the target JDK version.

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Migrate Keycloak service from the deprecated jboss namespace to the official quay.io registry.
Update environment variables to match Keycloak 17+ admin configuration standards (KEYCLOAK_ADMIN instead of KEYCLOAK_USER).
Change Keycloak startup command to use the new Quarkus-based 'start-dev' mode instead of legacy standalone flags.
